name: Qinghai Huzhu Barley Wine Co.,Ltd.
summary: Qinghai Huzhu Barley Wine Co.,Ltd. develops, produces, and sells highland barley wine in China. It offers its products under the Tianyou De, Mutual help, and Shiyide brands. The company is based in Weiyuan, China. Qinghai Huzhu Barley Wine Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Qinghai Huashi Technology Investment Management Co., Ltd.
